case_title: WONG, GERALDINE VS SWANN, R. SCOTT DBA R. SCOTT SWANN GEN. CONTRACTNG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG, GERALDINE AS TO DEFENDANT SWANN, R. SCOTT DBA R. SCOTT SWANN GEN. CONTRACTNG FOSTER, MARSHALL DBA MARSHALL FOSTER MSNRYCONT INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
